raw: Print from home. Pass admits 2 adults and up to 4 children/grandchildren into the Seacoast Science Center at 50% off the cost of regular admission. Pass holder receives 10% discount in the Nature Store Library pass does NOT include the State Park admission. Park fees are $4 per adult (ages 12+) and $2 per child (ages 6-11) . Office use only: _____#adults _____#children _____# under3 _____ # seniors

source_phrases.audience_policies[0].form: 50% off the cost of regular admission
